fato_historico: 1934: West Coast waterfront strike: In Seattle, police fire tear gas on and club 2,000 striking longshoremen. The governor of Oregon calls out the National Guard to break a strike on the Portland docks.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos suggests you may find your inner peace amidst turmoil today. Much like the quiet aftermath of historical storms clearing for calmer tides, your spirit is invited to release old tensions. It is a good time to embrace stillness, allowing your sensitive soul to drift away from conflicts and focus on building bridges of deep emotional understanding.
frase_do_dia: After the strongest winds, the ocean always returns to its gentle, rhythmic pulse.
significado_numero: Represents the seeker of truth and the quiet wisdom of intuition.
conselho: Consider stepping away from loud environments to nurture your beautiful, creative inner world.
